content.en:
Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian performed the Hundred Transformations Void Technique, a kind of Dao intertwined in the void, turning into the Void Realm, and the changes of many Dao gradually derived more changes and mysteries.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Transformation Realm will was also constantly integrated into the Void Realm.

Knock knock knock!!

Under the operation of the Variety Void Transformation Technique, Ye Tian's will resonated with the Void Realm, and under the resonance, the will also resonated and refined.

"What a wonderful secret technique, it can even temper the will in such a way!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

In the Origin Realm Sea, where would there be such a secret technique?

Of course, even in the Ruins of Eternity, ordinary half-step perfect controllers would not be able to obtain the Hundred Transformation Void Technique, and even if they did, they would not be able to practice the Hundred Transformation Void Technique.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian's will continued to improve, plus there were some treasures that could improve the Hundred Transformation Void Technique, making Ye Tian's will improve faster.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, 10,000 eternal years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's will has finally been raised to the extreme of the will of the Transformation Realm, and he is about to step into the realm of half-step perfect will.

"I have finally reached the limit of the will of the Transformation Realm, even if I am a master, I have not reached this realm. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He knew that the master and the primordial ancestor had all raised the body of control to the body of half-step perfect control through various methods, but they had not reached the half-step perfect will.

After all, in the Origin Realm Sea, the difficulty of improving the will is even more difficult than controlling the body, as long as there is no good way to improve.

"For the time being, you can't continue to practice the Hundred Transformation Void Transformation Technique, and strive to break two more control chains, and then you can impact the half-step perfect controller realm!"

Ye Tian planned.

In the following years, Ye Tian went all out to buy the two treasures of Extreme Dao Black Gold and White Shadow Water, but the value of this treasure was too expensive, and when he joined the Daoless Tower, all the contribution points of the rewards were exhausted.

In other words, he couldn't buy more Extreme Black Gold and White Shadow Water for the time being.

As for collecting it yourself, it's too much of a waste of time, and almost all the places where the Black Gold and White Shadow Water of the Extreme Dao are abundant are occupied by the major forces.

Therefore, if he tried to look for it himself, he could hardly find much.

"I have to earn some contribution points, and then buy them from the inside of the Wudao Tower, this is the fastest way!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, Ye Tian inquired about the task of the Daoless Tower through his own branch of the Daoless Tower.

It's too much of a time-wasting task, and he won't do it.

For example, some tasks often cost millions of eternal years, and the eternal years of the Eternal Ruins are too long, millions of times larger than the time units of the Origin Boundary Sea's Boundary River Years!

Therefore, millions of eternal years were simply too long years for him, and he had never cultivated such a long time.

Therefore, he would not do such a time-consuming task, it was a complete waste of time, and it was only suitable for those cultivators who could not make progress for a long time.

Ye Tian flipped through the tasks one by one, and most of them were not suitable for him.

After a long time, Ye Tian took a fancy to a task.

"Collect the Liquid Gold!"

The reason why this task was suitable for him was because many Ten Realm-level masters did not dare to collect it, and the half-step perfect masters were also unwilling to collect it, so it was not worth it at all.

The Liquid of Exile is located in the Realm of Exiled Gold, a special world in the Ruins of Eternity, although the area is not large, but it is very dangerous, and the key is that the perfect master will be rejected.

Of course, the Perfect Controller could forcibly enter, but it was completely unnecessary to contend with the entire Origin of the Exiled Golden Light Realm.

The Wandering Golden Light Realm only allows half-step perfect controllers to enter at most, but there is a terrifying Drifting Golden Wire in the Glazed Golden Light Realm.

This kind of Drifting Golden Thread runs through the Drifting Golden Light Realm, even if the half-step perfect master is cut, it will be cut into countless pieces in an instant, and it cannot be recovered, and it will directly collapse and fall in the body of the half-step perfect master.

And cultivators who enter the Wandering Golden Light Realm will almost always encounter this kind of Wandering Golden Thread, and the probability of being killed is too great.

Whether it is a Ten Realm-level master, or a more powerful half-step perfect master, they only dare to let the will doppelganger in.

But once the will clone falls, it will not be able to recover for a long time, and the loss is not small.

Collecting Liquid Flowing Gold is not cost-effective because the loss of the Clone of the Will can be greater than the loss of the Clone.

Moreover, if the number of falls of the will clone is too high, it will also affect the will.

Therefore, very few cultivators dared to enter the Drifting Golden Light Realm, which also led to the high value of the Exiled Golden Liquid.

As for the effect of the liquid gold, the task did not say it, Ye Tian simply checked the information, and he knew its function.

"Flowing away from the golden liquid can improve the body of perfect control by half a step!"

Ye Tian understood its value.

The half-step perfect mastery of the half-step perfect master can also continue to improve until the perfect mastery body, so the value of the treasures that can improve the half-step perfect mastery body is extremely expensive.

Among them, the value of glazed gold liquid is naturally very expensive, even if it is a roadless tower, it is also very much in need of glazed gold liquid, so a long-term mission has been released.

"The other cultivators of the Wudao Pagoda are definitely reluctant to leave the Golden Light Realm, but I'm not afraid, I can still copy the copy body, and I can let the copy body pass, it's a big deal that the copy body falls, I continue to condense, and the price I pay is not big. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He left the Daoless Tower and headed for the Exile Golden Light Realm.

The area where the Exile Golden Light Realm is located is blocked layer by layer, and not all cultivators are qualified to enter, only a few forces in the Eternal Ruins can enter, after all, the Exiled Gold Liquid is also an incomparably precious resource, and naturally it will not be stolen by some small forces or casual cultivators.

Ye Tian was a member of the Wudao Tower, and after taking out the tower order of the Wudao Tower, no one dared to stop him.

Thus.

He easily came to the Exile Golden Light Realm.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian quickly condensed a copy body, and then let this copy body condense the will clone.

And just like that, two bodies appeared.

Subsequently, the two bodies entered the Exile Golden Light Realm one after another.

Whenever there is some gain, Ye Tian will prepare to come out, and then go in, so that he can ensure that he can continue to obtain the Flowing Gold Liquid, as for the copy of the body and the will clone, the fall will also fall, it is not a problem.

After entering the Exiled Golden Light Realm, the replicating body and the clone of the will began to go crazy, searching for the whereabouts of the Exiled Golden Liquid.

The Drifting Gold Liquid is scattered all over the Drifting Golden Light Realm, and it is indeed not easy to find, but with the passage of time, it is sure that a lot can be found.

Soon.

Ye Tian's copy body found a drop of flowing gold liquid.
